mapper.insert: INSERT INTO operating_fx_pnl (fx_transaction_id, from_currency, to_currency, base_currency, realized_pnl, mid_rate, applied_rate, idempotency_key) VALUES (#{fxTransactionId}, #{fromCurrency}, #{toCurrency}, #{baseCurrency}, #{realizedPnl}, #{midRate}, #{appliedRate}, #{idempotencyKey})
